mapper.select: SELECT r.*, s.space_number as spaceNumber FROM parking_record r LEFT JOIN parking_space s ON r.space_id = s.id ORDER BY r.entry_time DESC
SELECT * FROM parking_record WHERE space_id = #{spaceId} AND status = 0 LIMIT 1
SELECT * FROM parking_record WHERE plate_number = #{plateNumber} AND status = 1 AND payment_status = 0
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO parking_record (plate_number, space_id, entry_time, status, payment_status) VALUES (#{plateNumber}, #{spaceId}, #{entryTime}, #{status}, #{paymentStatus})
mapper.update: UPDATE parking_record SET exit_time = #{exitTime}, fee = #{fee}, status = #{status}, payment_status = #{paymentStatus} WHERE id = #{id}
